scope: TDD RED phase — single failing test for turn assistantContent
test_added: turn contains assistantContent when hook fires with text

result.reason: content.turns is undefined — handleTextComplete writes _schema/sessionId/status but no turns array

evidence.test_output: AssertionError: Target cannot be null or undefined. at line 54: expect(content.turns).toHaveLength(1)
evidence.root_cause: handleTextComplete (src/hooks/text-complete-handler.ts:156-175) writes a flat session object with no turns array. The addTurn function exists in the factory-based createTextCompleteHandler but the standalone handleTextComplete function used by tests bypasses it entirely.

recommended_next_action: GREEN phase: implement turns array with assistantContent in handleTextComplete so test passes

delegation_packet.scope: Implement turns array with assistantContent in handleTextComplete
delegation_packet.constraint: Must make test2 pass without breaking test1
